candidate.title: Resnics Stargate-N2025 DPU catalog field promotion

local_checks.raw_manifest_scan: Existing local capture found and reused: raw/crawler/compute-accelerators-resnics-stargate-n2025/20260628T060657411423Z-www-resnics-com-product-stargate-n2025-dpu-f2feeec038.md. No new external fetch was needed.
local_checks.wiki_search: Existing curated references mentioned Stargate-N2025 as a raw DPU/SmartNIC comparison row, but no resnics-stargate-n2025 SKU, observation, or resolved-spec row existed before this parent task.
local_checks.domain_index_scan: ai_infra wiki/index.md routes this work to Compute Accelerator Spec Catalog, Compute Accelerator Parameter Comparison, Network Storage Cluster Infrastructure, and AI Infra Coverage Map; no dedicated Resnics page was needed.
local_checks.prior_manifest_scan: Prior Resnics r10 task-3 resolved Stargate-N1025 and Stargate-S1100 and explicitly deferred N2025; continuation parent-1 resolved Corigine, parent-3 resolved Yusur, parent-4 resolved H200 SXM, parent-5 resolved Kubernetes/Kueue/Volcano issue signals, and parent-6 resolved AWS/Lambda operational signals. This task does not repeat those rows.

duplicate_boundary_checks.result: No pre-existing resnics-stargate-n2025 SKU row; added one product-specific DPU row.
No pre-existing N2025 observations; added observations only for form_factor, network_bandwidth, memory_capacity, host_interface, and tdp.
No pre-existing N2025 resolved fields; added five resolved fields pointing to new N2025 observations.

Existing N2025 row remains a raw comparison row for unsupported virtualization, RDMA, P4, protocol, storage-offload, benchmark, and operations text; the resolved table adds only the bounded product-spec fields.
N2025 is kept as product-specific DPU SmartNIC catalog evidence, not a general storage-fabric, benchmark, operations, or SLO claim.

Only hardware-accelerator and network-storage-cluster layers were updated; blocked KServe, inference-serving postmortem, MLCommons exact-result, and RAG propagation/drift/alert/cost gaps remain unresolved.
Added a separate known_source entry for parent-7 Resnics N2025 fields without mutating blocked_items or existing blocked coverage_gaps.

gap_reason: The local corpus already contained a product-specific Resnics Stargate-N2025 capture with schema-supported DPU SmartNIC fields that had not yet been promoted into the structured accelerator catalog.

fields.network_bandwidth: 50 Gb/s aggregate data-port bandwidth from 2 x SFP28 25G Ethernet
fields.memory_capacity: 24 GB aggregate visible DDR4 capacity from 8 GB FPGA logic memory plus 16 GB SoC logic memory

schema_boundary.boundary: Not promoted because the catalog has no SR-IOV PF/VF count field and the task is bounded to product-spec fields listed by the planner.
Not promoted because the catalog has no RDMA queue-pair count field.

schema_boundary.source_value: P4 flow-table count, flow-table offload performance, connection-tracking table size, and new-session rate
schema_boundary.boundary: Not promoted because spec-fields.yaml has no P4 flow-table, flow-update-rate, CT table, or session-rate fields.

schema_boundary.source_value: virtio, NVMe-oF/TCP, iSCSI, Ceph, iSER, OVS, storage acceleration, line-rate forwarding, low-latency, and protocol-support text
schema_boundary.boundary: Comparison-only product-page text; not promoted as protocol, storage-fabric, benchmark, operations, or SLO evidence.

schema_boundary.source_value: FPGA logic memory 8GB DDR4 SDRAM x72 bits and SoC logic memory 16GB DDR4 SDRAM x72 bits
schema_boundary.boundary: Promoted as memory_capacity only with explicit split-pool notes. The catalog records 24 GB aggregate visible capacity and does not treat it as a single uniform memory pool.

non_promoted_boundaries: No Resnics Stargate-N1025 or Stargate-S1100 resolved fields were modified.

No Corigine, Yusur, Asterfusion, Dayu, Nebula, Huawei, Biren, Cambricon, Kunlunxin, H200, AWS/Lambda, Kubernetes/Kueue/Volcano, SGLang, KServe, inference-serving postmortem, MLCommons exact-result, or RAG propagation/drift/alert/cost row was modified except as duplicate-boundary text where already present.
No benchmark, production-operations, generalized storage-performance, protocol, RDMA performance, or SLO claim was promoted from the N2025 capture.
